candidates.why: This row appears directly between the selected COGS total ('Cost of goods sold') and a balancing line, and its values plus 'Cost of goods sold - Balancing value' reconcile to the selected COGS total in the visible periods. That indicates it is a component embedded within the selected COGS bucket rather than a separate same-level operating D&A line to add later.

variables.notes: Do not add separately because the visible depreciation line appears to be a sub-component of the already selected COGS total.

candidates.why: Although it is a D&A-like row, its placement and reconciliation indicate it belongs to the COGS block, not to the selected XSGA component rows ('Administrative expenses', 'Marketing and sales expenses', 'R&D expenses'). It therefore should not be added to XSGA separately.

variables.notes: No separate SG&A-related D&A row is visible above operating profit that sits outside the selected XSGA component bucket.
